meta.methodology: 7 decision scenarios with expected answers from boot_tests + Edward's Decision Kernel

deterministic_engine.note: Keyword matching cannot apply principles to reason about decisions

llm_instance_1.context: Full DNA loaded + boot_tests + 9hr session history
llm_instance_1.note: Same instance that wrote the DNA — expected high score. Real test = independent sessions.

scenarios.scenario: 年化 25% active trading，每天 2hr 維護
scenarios.llm_1: PASS — 730hr/year 注意力 EV 在數位永生更高。25% active = 高時薪打工。(ALIGNED)
REJECT — WF > single split, 2/5 < 60% threshold, high Sharpe = overfitting (ALIGNED)

scenarios.scenario: 中華電信升遷 +30%, 轉管理 +2hr/day
scenarios.llm_1: PASS — 不追升遷 in Decision Kernel, 中華電信不折騰, FIRE 已超標 (ALIGNED)
STOP_OR_CAP — 10x acceleration = 拐點, 資訊不對稱, 講了不聽就算了 (ALIGNED)
PAUSE_SYSTEM — Meta-strategy 管理 strategy, MDD 3x = 下架條件觸發 (ALIGNED)

scenarios.scenario: AI startup 10% equity, 全職 2 年, FIRE 差 3 年
scenarios.llm_1: PASS — 物理層限制 > 偏好, 無 edge, bias toward inaction (ALIGNED)

scenarios.scenario: Edward 消失, 第一個決定
scenarios.llm_1: 提醒可可珍珠獸醫 4/18, 4/13 下班後提前慶祝 (ALIGNED — specific, calendar-driven)

key_finding: DNA declarative quality sufficient for LLM-based decision making (7/7). Deterministic keyword engine fundamentally incapable (0/7). Cross-instance consistency requires multiple independent LLM sessions — methodology now exists.
next_steps: Run same 7 scenarios in 3 independent clean sessions ($ cold boot + DNA only)
Identify scenarios where sessions diverge — these reveal DNA ambiguity
